title: Newegg Competitors in 2026 - Amazon, Best Buy, and Other E-commerce Competitors
text:
Newegg Commerce Competitive Landscape Analysis - May 2026.

Key Competitors: Newegg's competitors include Micro Center, Amazon, Best Buy, and Ingram Micro. Newegg's top competitors are Amazon, Best Buy and Adorama.

Market Position and Size: Amazon captures about 40 cents of every dollar spent online in the US. In contrast, Newegg's trailing twelve month revenue is $1.44B, with Best Buy's current market cap at $28.95B.

Customer Perception: Newegg's Product Quality Score ranks 4th against its competitors below Best Buy, and its Net Promoter Score of -19 ranks 5th against its competitors. Newegg's Pricing Score ranks 3rd against its competitors, below Ingram Micro.

Recent Regulatory Activity: Amazon employees have contacted suppliers after seeing products with lower prices on competing sites, including Best Buy and Newegg Commerce Inc. This was documented in an antitrust case filed in 2026.

Market Dynamics: The search results show that while Newegg competes with Amazon and Best Buy in the e-commerce tech products space, Amazon dominates the overall online retail market, and Best Buy maintains a significantly larger market capitalization than Newegg. Newegg's competitive advantage lies in its specialized focus on tech products and gaming hardware.
